message:
Command `# The libs from the LIB variable. Also need MACRO libs (CF_SRAM).
# Let's check how io.tcl uses _PNR_LIBS to understand what format it expects

grep -A20 "_PNR_LIBS" /nix/store/dygnx4pddrv785rmrg7jb5gks9z6hrx7-python3-3.11.9-env/lib/python3.11/site-packages/librelane/scripts/openroad/common/io.tcl | head -30` executed with exit code 0.

function.name: execute_bash

extras.command:
# The libs from the LIB variable. Also need MACRO libs (CF_SRAM).
# Let's check how io.tcl uses _PNR_LIBS to understand what format it expects

grep -A20 "_PNR_LIBS" /nix/store/dygnx4pddrv785rmrg7jb5gks9z6hrx7-python3-3.11.9-env/lib/python3.11/site-packages/librelane/scripts/openroad/common/io.tcl | head -30
